title: excoecaria bicolor var. orientalis
intro: Excoecaria bicolor var. orientalis, also known as the Asian milky mangrove, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria bicolor var. orientalis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and it may also have antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Excoecaria bicolor var. orientalis typically involve extracting its latex, which can be used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or topical applications.
